title: Recovery Homes/Halfway Houses - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Mental & Behavioral Health > Recovery Homes/Halfway Houses 9 Matching Service Providers Refine Results - Select - No Filter Men Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF ADDICTIONS RECOVERY CENTER FRESH START WITHDRAWAL MANAGEMENT TRANSITION HOUSING Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides low-cost housing to men and women in the early stages of sobriety who are in transition to the next level of recovery. 1021 E Main Street Medford, OR 97504 Eligibility: Age 18 and older Hours: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Email (541) 776-7086 Get Directions Visit Website More Details BRIDGEWAY OF HOPE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides faith-based housing for men for up to 24 months who wish to live clean and sober. Services provided to clients include case management, work force development, assistance with getting ID, and overcoming other barriers to stability. 6655 NE 82nd Avenue Portland, OR 97220 Eligibility: Men age 18 and older who have previously gone through an inpatient treatment program. There is no maximum period of length on when the inpatient program was completed. Hours: Intake: Monday-Friday 9am-3pm Email (971) 230-5310 Get Directions Visit Website More Details CENTRAL CITY CONCERN HOUSING AND DEVELOPMENT SUPPORTIVE HOUSING Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers a variety of affordable housing options, including transitional housing and permanent supportive housing. These options combine affordable housing with essential services such as health care, recovery support, employment assistance, and veteran services. Also provides subsidized rental units to help ensure long-term housing stability 523 NW Everett Street Portland, OR 97209 Eligibility: Individuals and families experiencing homelessness, individuals in recovery, those struggling with mental health challenges, living with HIV/AIDS or other disabling conditions, and/or a history of criminal involvement, and veterans experiencing homelessness Hours: Varies by property Email (503) 548-4931 Get Directions Visit Website More Details COMMUNITY OUTREACH INC TRANSFORMATIVE SHELTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides transitional housing. Residents will be offered access to case management services, medical and dental treatment, access to food pantry, as well as courses on life, career, computer, health, cooking, nutrition, communication, and overcoming barriers to acquiring permanent housing. Residents may also have access to domestic violence support, substance abuse and mental health counseling, and household and hygiene supplies. 865 NW Reiman Avenue Corvallis, OR 97330 Eligibility: Adult individuals age 18 or older or families with children under age 18 Must agree to be clean and sober for the duration of stay. Must not have a registered sex offense. Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (541) 758-3000 Get Directions Visit Website More Details EUGENE MISSION LIFE CHANGE PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides an 18 month long faith-based recovery program. Residents are provided with case management, mental health supports, vocational support, recovery supports, and life skills classes. Residents must remain clean and sober for the duration of the program and will be subject to urinalysis testing. 1542 W 1st Avenue Eugene, OR 97402 Eligibility: Adults age 18 and older Hours: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Email (544) 344-3251 129 Get Directions Visit Website More Details JEFFERSON COUNTY FAITH BASED NETWORK JORDAN CROSSING Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides sober living and transitional housing. Offers a recovery home that addresses addiction, homelessness, and other barriers through structured support, faith-based education, prayer, and Bible studies. Eligibility: Men age 18 and older Hours: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Email (458) 800-4208 Get Directions Visit Website More Details JEFFERSON COUNTY FAITH BASED NETWORK PEARSON'S CROSSING Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides sober living and transitional housing. Offers a recovery home that addresses addiction, homelessness, and other barriers through structured support, faith-based education, prayer, and Bible studies. Eligibility: Single women age 18 and older, including pregnant women and women with children under age 5 Hours: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Email (458) 800-4208 Get Directions Visit Website More Details MENTAL HEALTH AND ADDICTION CERTIFICATION BOARD OF OREGON OREGON RECOVERY RESIDENCES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides up to date information on recovery housing in Oregon; information is updated by agencies and recovery residence operators. 2209 Lloyd Center Portland, OR 97232 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Not applicable Email (503) 231-8164 Get Directions Visit Website More Details TRANSCENDING HOPE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a structured housing environment for those seeking recovery from addiction, alcoholism, incarceration, and/or mental health issues. 29 locations, including Aid & Assist Community Restoration, and culturally responsive Latino and Latina housing. 347A 1st Avenue Hillsboro, OR 97123 Eligibility: Must be working towards abstinence Hours: Not applicable Email (971) 449-6793 Get Directions Visit Website More Details ADDICTIONS RECOVERY CENTER TRANSITION HOUSING BRIDGEWAY OF HOPE BRIDGEWAY OF HOPE CENTRAL CITY CONCERN SUPPORTIVE HOUSING COMMUNITY OUTREACH INC TRANSFORMATIVE SHELTER EUGENE MISSION LIFE CHANGE PROGRAM MENTAL HEALTH AND ADDICTION CERTIFICATION BOARD OF OREGON OREGON RECOVERY RESIDENCES TRANSCENDING HOPE TRANSCENDING HOPE
